name: Gemini 3.5 Flash

price.provider: Google AI Studio / Vertex AI (Gemini API)

note: First Flash to beat the prior-gen Pro flagship; I/O 2026 headline, 4x faster output than rival frontier models.

results.notes: Humanity's Last Exam, full set (text + MM), no tools stated; corroborated by Vellum leaderboard (40.2)
GPQA Diamond, measured by Artificial Analysis (cited via BenchLM, which states AA reports 92.2%); Vals AI GPQA mirror reports 92.7%; no official Google number published
MMMU, LayerLens/Stratix independent eval via PricePerToken leaderboard; split (validation) not explicitly stated
GDPval-AA, Elo-style rating for economically valuable knowledge work.

τ²-Bench Telecom agentic tool-use eval, Artificial Analysis independent evaluation (raw score 0.9532163742690, model page's default/'(high)' reasoning-effort listing for the gemini-3-5-flash slug -- same page/source pattern already used for this model's existing GPQA and MMMU-Pro entries). Corroborated qualitatively (score not given) by multiple launch-week roundups citing AA's Tau2-Bench Telecom coverage of this model. Not previously tracked.
IFBench instruction-following eval, Artificial Analysis independent evaluation (raw score 0.7632653061224, same model-page listing as the tau2-bench-telecom entry above). Not previously tracked.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: launched at Google I/O 2026-05-19 with immediate GA (no waitlist), confirmed via blog.google and deepmind.google/models/gemini/flash/ (both fetched directly). All 4 benchmark numbers (SWE-bench Pro 55.1, MMMU-Pro 83.6, Terminal-Bench 2.1 76.2, CharXiv 84.2) literally confirmed on the cited pages. 1M/64k context, text/image/video/audio input modalities, and $1.50/$9 pricing all confirmed independently. No changes to record.
